word: H5492 - סוּפָה - çûwphâh - soo-faw' - Red Sea

sections.paragraph:
Original: סוּפה

Transliteration: sûphâh

Phonetic: soo-faw'

BDB Definition:

Suphah = "honeycomb: overflow"
  1. storm-wind (noun feminine)
  2. a place east of the Jordan (noun proper locative)

Origin: from H5486

TWOT entry: 1478b

Part(s) of speech:
